entry.title: New: RES25-326 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING GIFTS OF PRODUCTION SERVICES AND FEES, VALUED AT $10,000, TO THE CITY FROM THE ROYAL HAWAIIAN BAND MUSIC SOCIETY, FRIENDS OF THE ROYAL HAWAIIAN BAND, AND THE HAWAIIAN MUSIC HALL OF FAME FOR THE “KALIKIMAKA HO’OMAU” HOLIDAY CONCERT AT THE NEAL S. BLAISDELL CONCERT HALL ON NOVEMBER 28, 2025.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
